decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to its base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which exists in the registry with matching corridor_name (Webster Avenue), limits (from The Hub to Williamsbridge), borough (Bronx), and Bx41 route. No different existing record is a better match; the observation is the same real-world entity as the canonical corridor_webster-ave-bronx record, which is its own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge
